name: Thief
description: A street-smart cutpurse in dark leather armor. Quick with a blade and quicker to disappear when things go south.

attacks.name: Short Sword
attacks.description: A swift blade strike aimed at vital spots

special_abilities.name: Sneak Attack
special_abilities.description: Deals extra 1d6 damage when attacking from behind or flanking

special_abilities.name: Cunning Action
special_abilities.description: Can hide or reposition after attacking

behavior.notes: Tries to position behind player for sneak attacks. Flees if HP drops below 6.
